title: Selective Mining
description: This mod, when enabled, prevents breaking blocks other than the initial type you mined. Which is pretty useful when you break blocks really fast.
body:
How to use?
-
- Setup a keybind to enable/disable this mod.
- Start mining to break a block, now you'll only mine blocks of that same type or state!
- Stop mining for a moment to choose a new block to focus on.

Why would you want this mod?
-
  - To focus on mining valuable resources without wasting time and durability on unwanted blocks.
  -  To target specific blocks without accidentally mining other blocks. This can be particularly useful when mining in tight spaces or trying to preserve the surrounding environment.

Logo from https://lucide.dev.
